name: Country-Style Chicken Kiev
recipeInstructions:
Makes: 4 Servings
Filling:
Stir together all filling ingredients. Divide into four equal portions.
Freeze the portions for at least 30 minutes. Preheat oven to 350°F.
Flatten each chicken breast to about 1/4". Place one portion of butter on each flattened breast.
Roll up and secure with wooden picks. In a 9-inch square pan, melt 1/4 cup butter in the oven.
Combine remaining chicken ingredients. Dip the rolled chicken in melted butter, then coat with crumb mixture.
Bake for 55-65 minutes or until fork tender. Remove wooden picks before serving.
Source: Land O Lakes Treasury of Country Recipes, Carolyn Shaw's Collection, 11-1-94
